title: Super Bosses
description: Any hostile mob can randomly spawn as a SUPER BOSS
body:
![Super Bosses Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c602d9a03e3395dd9d909b82e59105932702b04.png)
![Stronger Bosses. Multiplied Drops. Super, Super Duper, Mega, and Ultra Mega. Each bigger than the last with more item drops at their feet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd96fe64a37fc8efa19d643703c6fa77bd3df636.png)
**Every Monster has a random chance to spawn as a Super Boss! The higher the level of boss, the stronger they'll be and the more their drops will be multiplied!**
![Works with ALL Modded Mobs!* (*I'm like 99% sure)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/262ad3df67305aea2b5285b491e1609922f87e4d.png)
![Customizable Via Datapacks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ea9f0d0c175ac0b2984ab6e54db58e8a2092280.png)
**With Datapacks you can fully customize Boss stats, spawn rates, or even add your own kinds of bosses! For more information check out the [Super Bosses Wiki](https://github.com/EMyGuy/SuperBosses/wiki)!**

**Mob drops are customizable via the config where there is also a whitelist and blacklist for what mobs can spawn as Bosses!**
![Planned Updates! Config options, Ensure balance, Less Dependencies, 1.19.2 Port, 1.20.1 port, 1.16.5 port, and more! Feel free to leave suggestions!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaa658d77dbc0bad24f86edf626d400a5cce7951.png)
![Requirements: KubeJS, LootJS, Mobs Properties Randomness, Pehkui (Pehkui requirement can be removed through a datapack)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56c5ba1e777c96cf4b9d4082333b8e1efe1f16ea.png)
![Bisect Hosting Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac027bab2d302316daa87f731f1d9ef483add0d9.png)
[Bisect Hosting Link!](https://bisecthosting.com/boiz)
